name: io.github.stagproject/mirelia-structured-data-marketplace
description: USPTO patent MCP server for competitive intelligence, prior art search, and R&D scouting. 3000+ AI-enriched JSON patents (CPC G/H). Tools: search_single_patents, search_packages, purchase_single_patent, verify_crypto_payment_and_deliver. x402 on-chain settlement on Polygon, Base, Oasis. Listed on xpay.tools.
